MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James J. Dowgialo, Esq., 362-1354, for plaintiff MBA PERSONNEL INC., moving to enforce judgment, Stipulated Judgment, etc.

Ruling:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The Court heard and denied plaintiff's request to strike late filing of opposition. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING as amended -- PLAINTIFF MBA PERSONNEL INC.'S MOTION TO ENFORCE JUDGMENT, STIP JUDGMENT, ETC. -- CONTINUED TO 1/9/04: OPPOSING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER reflecting THE NEW HEARING DATE. Plaintiff allowed to file reply to opposition and to send notice to defendant of the new hearing date. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, CSR: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
